title: Update UI theme to authentic Free Fire battle aesthetics and display owner name NIRANJAN

requirements.text: Replace current background styling across all pages with authentic Free Fire battle-themed backgrounds featuring battlefield environments, combat zones, and in-game visual elements characteristic of real Free Fire gameplay.

quotes: Change background and themes in real free fire battle

acceptanceCriteria: All pages display Free Fire battle-themed backgrounds instead of generic dark gaming backgrounds
Background imagery reflects actual Free Fire battle environments and combat aesthetics
Backgrounds maintain visual consistency across the application

requirements.text: Update the application's color scheme and theme styling to match authentic Free Fire battle aesthetics, including Free Fire's signature color palette, UI patterns from the actual game, and combat-inspired visual elements throughout all components and pages.

quotes: Change background and themes in real free fire battle

acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme reflects authentic Free Fire game colors and battle UI patterns
All gaming-themed components (buttons, cards, navigation) use Free Fire battle-inspired styling
Theme maintains cohesion with Free Fire's actual in-game interface aesthetics

requirements.text: Display the owner name 'NIRANJAN' prominently in the application interface, ensuring it is clearly visible and appropriately styled to match the Free Fire battle theme.
acceptanceCriteria: Owner name 'NIRANJAN' is displayed in a prominent location visible to users
Name styling is consistent with Free Fire battle theme aesthetics
Text is clearly readable against the battle-themed background

constraints: Maintain existing functionality while updating visual theme
Keep mobile responsiveness intact during theme changes
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui
nonGoals: Modifying backend logic or data structures
Altering user authentication or admin systems

required: Free Fire battle background with combat zone environment and battlefield elements (ff-battle-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Free Fire themed header background with game UI elements (ff-header-bg.dim_1200x400.png)
